versionHistory.notes: Initial release — base search, Tank Mix, Container Coverage, Cost Comparison, Nozzle calculators, SDS, Permits, APVMA registry.
Major update — 20 new products, fixed 51 label data errors, phrase search, category pill filters, collapsible filter panel, search tips popup, UI cleanup.
Rebrand to Spray Hub (sprayhub.com.au). Full SEO overhaul, Open Graph, structured data, dynamic stats, desktop layout redesign, collapsible sidebar, Lawn & Turf Care Guide.
